description: sandals from fila are made with fine fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. These Emperro floaters from fila are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The synthetic upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. Wear these with your off-duty essentials.UpperSynthetic upper with forefoot, collar and ankle straps, complete with Velcro fasteners for a snug FitCushioned lining for greater comfort on the ankle strap and collarAppliquéd logo on the strapsDetachable back strap so that floaters can be worn as sandalsCushioned and curved footbed with textured patterning for soft massage feel and all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for durability and a curved midfootFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetSandal careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
